sourcesContent:
n = 2
label = ""
switch n
  when 1
    label = "one"
  when 2, 3
    label = "few"
  else
    label = "many"
big = 0
switch
  when n > 10
    big = 1
  else
    big = 0
result = ""
done = 0
try
  result = risky()
catch e
  result = "err"
finally
  done = 1
ignored = 0
try
  f()
catch
  ignored = 1
x = 0
loop
  x += 1
  break if x > 2
